symptom_text: 62 year old woman, 3 days of fever, productive cough with green sputum and right-sided pleuritic chest pain. Respiratory rate 22, SpO2 94%, focal crackles right base.

plan: Oral antibiotics if low risk, review at 48h
treatment.monitoring: Re-assess in 48h; return if SpO2 falls or breathlessness worsens.

symptom_text: 55 year old man, fever and cough for four days, yellow sputum, mild dyspnea on exertion, crackles at left lung base, SpO2 95%.

treatment.monitoring: Follow-up in 2-3 days; escalate if hypoxic.

symptom_text: 40 year old, dry then productive cough for one week, no fever, chest clear, no dyspnea, recent cold. Vitals normal.

treatment.monitoring: Return if fever develops or cough persists beyond 3 weeks.

symptom_text: 33 year old, persistent cough with clear sputum for 10 days after a viral illness, no fever, lungs clear, normal saturations.

treatment.monitoring: Safety-net for worsening or new fever.

symptom_text: 67 year old man, central crushing chest pain radiating to the left arm and jaw, diaphoretic, nausea. HR 110, BP 100/60. Pain at rest for 40 minutes.

treatment.monitoring: Continuous cardiac monitoring; admit.

symptom_text: 58 year old woman, sudden severe chest pressure radiating to arm, sweating and shortness of breath, HR 118, BP 95/58, looks unwell.

treatment.monitoring: Resuscitation area; cardiac monitor.

symptom_text: 60 year old, chest tightness on exertion relieved by rest over several weeks, no pain at rest, normal vitals, known hypertension.
next_best_test: Exercise stress test or CT coronary angiography

treatment.monitoring: Review symptoms; seek help if pain at rest.

symptom_text: 29 year old woman, throbbing unilateral headache with photophobia and nausea, lasting hours, no fever, no neck stiffness, recurrent over years.

treatment.monitoring: Headache diary; review if frequency increases.

symptom_text: 35 year old, recurrent pulsating headache on one side with light sensitivity and nausea, no neurological deficit, normal exam.

treatment.monitoring: Review for prophylaxis if >4 attacks/month.

symptom_text: 45 year old, bilateral band-like pressure headache, mild, no nausea, no photophobia, stress at work, normal exam.

treatment.monitoring: Avoid analgesic overuse; review if pattern changes.

symptom_text: 26 year old woman, dysuria, urinary frequency and urgency, suprapubic discomfort, no fever, no flank pain, no vaginal discharge.

treatment.monitoring: Return if fever or flank pain develops.

symptom_text: 31 year old woman, burning on urination and frequency for two days, mild lower abdominal discomfort, afebrile.

treatment.monitoring: Safety-net for upper tract symptoms.

symptom_text: 40 year old woman, high fever with rigors, flank pain, dysuria, nausea and vomiting, costovertebral angle tenderness.

treatment.monitoring: Review in 24-48h; admit if septic.

symptom_text: 19 year old, periumbilical pain migrating to the right lower quadrant, anorexia, low-grade fever, nausea, tenderness and guarding at McBurney's point.

treatment.monitoring: Serial abdominal exams; surgery review.

symptom_text: 23 year old, right lower abdominal pain starting near the navel, loss of appetite, mild fever, rebound tenderness.

treatment.monitoring: Admit; reassess pain and white cell count.

symptom_text: 28 year old, acute watery diarrhea and vomiting for one day after a takeaway meal, diffuse mild crampy abdominal pain, no blood, low-grade fever.

treatment.monitoring: Return if signs of dehydration or bloody stools.

symptom_text: 50 year old, vomiting and frequent loose stools since yesterday, generalized abdominal cramps, others at home affected, no blood in stool.

treatment.monitoring: Safety-net for dehydration.

symptom_text: 24 year old known asthmatic, increasing wheeze, breathlessness and cough over a day, using inhaler frequently, RR 24, audible wheeze, SpO2 93%.

treatment.monitoring: Admit if poor response or falling saturations.

symptom_text: 30 year old asthmatic, wheezy and short of breath after a chest infection, tight chest, peak flow reduced, talking in short sentences.

treatment.monitoring: Escalate if no improvement.

symptom_text: 48 year old, burning retrosternal discomfort after meals and when lying down, acid taste, worse at night, no exertional component, normal vitals.
next_best_test: Trial of PPI; endoscopy if alarm features

treatment.monitoring: Refer for endoscopy if dysphagia, weight loss or bleeding.

symptom_text: 52 year old, heartburn and acid regurgitation for weeks, worse after large meals, relieved by antacids, no red flags.

plan: Weight loss and avoid late meals
treatment.monitoring: Endoscopy if alarm symptoms.

symptom_text: 61 year old, sudden onset breathlessness and right-sided pleuritic chest pain, recent long-haul flight, calf swelling, HR 112, SpO2 92%.
next_best_test: CT pulmonary angiogram; Wells score and D-dimer

plan: Anticoagulation if confirmed or high probability
treatment.monitoring: Admit; monitor oxygenation and hemodynamics.

symptom_text: 70 year old, acute shortness of breath and chest pain worse on inspiration, immobile after surgery, tachycardic, low oxygen saturation.

treatment.monitoring: Continuous monitoring; admit.

symptom_text: 38 year old, abrupt high fever, muscle aches, headache, dry cough and fatigue during flu season, no focal chest signs.

plan: Antivirals if early and high risk
treatment.monitoring: Return if breathless or not improving in a week.
